subject: Ark Angel TT — short dark-cloaked figure wielding a large curved scythe, standing in a stone chamber bathed in blue-purple magical light
description: A short, dark-cloaked humanoid figure stands in the foreground gripping a large curved scythe that extends well above its head. The figure wears an oversized dark hat and dark garments, its face partially visible as pale. The scythe has a long curved blade with an ornate handle. Behind the figure, tall stone columns or pillars frame the scene, and a strong blue-purple luminescent glow emanates from behind or below, suggesting magical or otherworldly energy in an enclosed stone space. The overall atmosphere is dark, somber, and foreboding. The art is rendered in a 3D or semi-realistic CG style consistent with FFXI's aesthetic.
foreground: Short dark-cloaked figure holding large curved scythe
background: Stone chamber with blue-purple magical glow and stone pillars
